global_kris.logic_summary: Measures the rate of protocol deviations per randomized participant in study C5091017. This includes deviations related to the 5-day ibuzatrelvir or placebo dosing schedule, missed NP/nasal swabs, or out-of-window visits through Week 24.
global_kris.corrective_action: Review the site's deviation log in the CTMS to identify trends, particularly around COVID-19 screening RATs or e-Diary compliance. Retrain site staff on the C5091017 protocol requirements and ensure proper documentation of any missed procedures.

global_kris.logic_summary: Calculates the number of treatment-emergent adverse events (TEAEs) reported per participant receiving ibuzatrelvir or placebo. Focuses on AEs occurring from the first dose on Day 1 through the end of the follow-up period at Week 24.
global_kris.corrective_action: Evaluate the AE eCRFs for completeness and timely entry by the site. If under-reporting is suspected, contact the site to ensure all AEs, especially those related to COVID-19 progression or rescue medication use, are properly recorded.

global_kris.logic_summary: Measures the rate of serious adverse events (SAEs), including COVID-19-related hospitalizations or deaths, per participant in study C5091017. Tracks events from the signing of the ICF through the final Week 24 or Early Termination visit.
global_kris.corrective_action: Cross-check SAE reports in the safety database against the eCRF to ensure prompt reporting within 24 hours. Verify that COVID-19-related hospitalizations are correctly captured as primary endpoint events and SAEs per protocol guidelines.

global_kris.logic_summary: Calculates the proportion of participants who discontinue study treatment (ibuzatrelvir/placebo) or withdraw from the study prior to the Week 24 visit.
global_kris.corrective_action: Review the Disposition eCRF to determine the primary reason for early termination, such as severe COVID-19 progression or withdrawal of consent. Discuss retention strategies with the site and ensure the Early Termination (ET) visit procedures, including the final NP swab, are completed.

study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Measures the proportion of missed EQ-5D patient-reported outcome assessments among randomized participants in study C5091017. Tracks completion at applicable in-person clinic visits and telephone contacts through Week 24.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Contact the site to investigate reasons for missing EQ-5D data and review ePRO system compliance. Retrain the site on reminding participants to complete their quality-of-life questionnaires during both clinic and home/telephone visits.

study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Calculates the percentage of missed PROMIS questionnaires expected to be completed by participants in study C5091017. Monitors ePRO compliance for assessing Long COVID/PASC symptoms up to Week 24.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Review ePRO completion logs and follow up with the site if PROMIS assessments are frequently missed. Instruct the site to emphasize the importance of symptom tracking to participants, especially during the post-acute follow-up epoch.

study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Measures the rate of missed Work Productivity and Activity Impairment (WPAI) assessments across scheduled visits for study C5091017. Evaluates participant compliance with this specific ePRO instrument through the end of the study.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Query the site regarding missing WPAI entries in the ePRO system. Provide site re-education on the collection schedule and encourage site staff to assist participants with ePRO access during clinic visits.

study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Calculates the proportion of participants who discontinue study treatment (ibuzatrelvir/placebo) or withdraw from the study prior to the Week 24 visit.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Review the Disposition eCRF to determine the primary reason for early termination, such as severe COVID-19 progression or withdrawal of consent. Discuss retention strategies with the site and ensure the Early Termination (ET) visit procedures, including the final NP swab, are completed.

study_specific_kris.iqmp_risk_id: 4368 - Error in Clinical Outcome Assessments (COAs) including PROs, ObsROs, ClinROs and PerfOs 12408 - VASI procedures or assessments not performed by an appropriately qualified or trained individual, or not performed due to lack of, or lapsed, certification of the qualified/trained individual
study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Measures the proportion of missed F-VASI assessments for randomized participants at applicable visits. Note that F-VASI is not explicitly listed as a required ePRO instrument in the C5091017 protocol digest.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Verify if this instrument was erroneously configured for study C5091017. If applicable, instruct the site to ensure all scheduled F-VASI assessments are entered into the ePRO system per the collection schedule.

study_specific_kris.iqmp_risk_id: 4368 - Error in Clinical Outcome Assessments (COAs) including PROs, ObsROs, ClinROs and PerfOs
study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Measures the proportion of missed PGIC-F assessments for randomized participants. Note that PGIC-F is not explicitly listed as a required ePRO instrument in the C5091017 protocol digest.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Confirm whether PGIC-F tracking is required for this specific COVID-19 study. If required, follow up with the site to address missing data and ensure assessments are completed at the specified visits.

study_specific_kris.iqmp_risk_id: 4368 - Error in Clinical Outcome Assessments (COAs) including PROs, ObsROs, ClinROs and PerfOs
study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Measures the proportion of missed PGIC-V assessments for randomized participants. Note that PGIC-V is not explicitly listed as a required ePRO instrument in the C5091017 protocol digest.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Check study configuration as PGIC-V is not a standard instrument for C5091017. If applicable, contact the site to ensure scheduled PGIC-V assessments are captured in the source and eCRF.

study_specific_kris.iqmp_risk_id: 4368 - Error in Clinical Outcome Assessments (COAs) including PROs, ObsROs, ClinROs and PerfOs 12408 - VASI procedures or assessments not performed by an appropriately qualified or trained individual, or not performed due to lack of, or lapsed, certification of the qualified/trained individual
study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Measures the proportion of missed T-VASI assessments for randomized participants. Note that T-VASI is not explicitly listed as a required ePRO instrument in the C5091017 protocol digest.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Verify the applicability of T-VASI for study C5091017. If applicable, notify the site that their missing assessment rate is high and retrain them on the required collection schedule.

study_specific_kris.iqmp_risk_id: 4368 - Error in Clinical Outcome Assessments (COAs) including PROs, ObsROs, ClinROs and PerfOs
study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Measures the proportion of missed PGIS-F assessments for randomized participants. Note that PGIS-F is not explicitly listed as a required ePRO instrument in the C5091017 protocol digest.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Confirm if PGIS-F is expected for this protocol. If so, query the site for missing data and emphasize the importance of completing all scheduled patient-reported outcomes.

study_specific_kris.iqmp_risk_id: 4368 - Error in Clinical Outcome Assessments (COAs) including PROs, ObsROs, ClinROs and PerfOs
study_specific_kris.logic_summary: Measures the proportion of missed PGIS-V assessments for randomized participants. Note that PGIS-V is not explicitly listed as a required ePRO instrument in the C5091017 protocol digest.
study_specific_kris.corrective_action: Review the ePRO setup to determine if PGIS-V is required for C5091017. If required, contact the site to ensure participants are completing the assessment at the scheduled timepoints.
